thoughts_srcpages_1129187669029.content: Next.js PagesRouter validator enforces default exports on every file under src/pages/, not just pages themselves — components inside subdirectories like board/ and error/ must also have default export

facts_build_1129189106891.content: The reported file (src/utils/helpers.ts) was already fixed; the pipeline surfaced missing defaults in unrelated pages/ subdirectory files that happened to also block the build.
